docket_entries.description: SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $400.00 AGAINST DEVONTE LAWS FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: JAN-24-2023, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE FEB-09-2023. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JAN-24-2023 CONTINUED TO MAR-28-2023 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT. JUDGE: ANNE-CHRISTINE MASSULLO; CLERK: S. LE; PROCEEDINGS NOT REPORTED. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAR-28-2023 CONTINUED TO JUN-13-2023 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S); PAY OUTSTANDING SANCTIONS. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

CASE DISMISSED AS TO ENTIRE ACTION BY COURT AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING JUN-13-2023 AT 10:30 AM. THIS DISMISSAL IS PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68608(B). THE COURT FINDS NO GOOD CAUSE OR SUBSTANTIAL JUSTIFICATION FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE PREVIOUS COURT ORDERS. A LESS SEVERE SANCTION WOULD NOT BE EFFECTIVE DUE TO THE HISTORY OF LACK OF COMPLIANCE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
